workflows.reconstructed_steps: Action Assessment -> Clinical Assessment -> Clinical Coding -> Images -> Mapper -> Properties -> Resources -> Select Patient And Assessment -> View Assessment
Clinical Assessment Master Flow -> Assessments Actions Flow -> Identify Context -> Direct Search -> Select Hospital -> Search -> View

validations.summary: /// Execute the evaluations one by one and build up the list of failures. /// A list of business rule failure. ///
/// Execute the evaluations one by one and build up the list of failures. /// A list of business rule failure. ///
/// Validates if user did select something in a Acuity information. ///
validations.conditions: observation == null || observation == NONE || observation == 0

validations.summary: /// Checks the enumeration recording for value. ///
validations.conditions: observation != null | observation.PossibleRecording?.PossibleRecordingId == null || observation.PossibleRecording?.PossibleRecordingId == ObservationConstants.NONE

validations.summary: /// Checks the text recording for value. ///
validations.conditions: observation != null | string.IsNullOrEmpty(observation.TextRecording

validations.summary: /// Checks the mandatory fields of the illness and trearment process. ///
/// Processes the illness and treatment recent illness validation. ///
validations.rule_references: CA_BR104 | CA_BR105 | CA_BR106 | CA_BR107 | CA_BR108 | CA_BR109
validations.conditions: recent != null && recent.PossibleRecording?.PossibleRecordingId != null && recent.PossibleRecording?.PossibleRecordingId == ObservationConstants.Boolean.TRUE | (recent != null && recent.PossibleRecording?.PossibleRecordingId == null | recentFamilyHistory != null && recentFamilyHistory.PossibleRecording?.PossibleRecordingId != null && recentFamilyHistory.PossibleRecording?.PossibleRecordingId == ObservationConstants.Boolean.TRUE

validations.summary: /// Processes the illness and treatment back or neck validation. ///
validations.rule_references: CA_BR098 | CA_BR099 | CA_BR100 | CA_BR101 | CA_BR102 | CA_BR103
validations.conditions: backOrNeck != null && backOrNeck.PossibleRecording?.PossibleRecordingId != null && backOrNeck.PossibleRecording?.PossibleRecordingId == ObservationConstants.Boolean.TRUE | (backOrNeck != null && backOrNeck.PossibleRecording?.PossibleRecordingId == null | backOrNeckFamilyHistory != null && backOrNeckFamilyHistory.PossibleRecording?.PossibleRecordingId != null && backOrNeckFamilyHistory.PossibleRecording?.PossibleRecordingId == ObservationConstants.Boolean.TRUE

validations.summary: /// Processes the illness and treatment excessive bleeding validation. ///
validations.rule_references: CA_BR092 | CA_BR093 | CA_BR094 | CA_BR095 | CA_BR096 | CA_BR097
validations.conditions: bleeding != null && bleeding.PossibleRecording?.PossibleRecordingId != null && bleeding.PossibleRecording?.PossibleRecordingId == ObservationConstants.Boolean.TRUE | (bleeding != null && bleeding.PossibleRecording?.PossibleRecordingId == null | bleedingFamilyHistory != null && bleedingFamilyHistory.PossibleRecording?.PossibleRecordingId != null && bleedingFamilyHistory.PossibleRecording?.PossibleRecordingId == ObservationConstants.Boolean.TRUE

validations.summary: /// Processes the illness and treatment depression validation. ///
validations.rule_references: CA_BR086 | CA_BR087 | CA_BR088 | CA_BR089 | CA_BR090 | CA_BR091
validations.conditions: depression != null && depression.PossibleRecording?.PossibleRecordingId != null && depression.PossibleRecording?.PossibleRecordingId == ObservationConstants.Boolean.TRUE | (depression != null && depression.PossibleRecording?.PossibleRecordingId == null | depressionFamilyHistory != null && depressionFamilyHistory.PossibleRecording?.PossibleRecordingId != null && depressionFamilyHistory.PossibleRecording?.PossibleRecordingId == ObservationConstants.Boolean.TRUE

validations.summary: /// Processes the illness and treatment epilepsy validation. ///
validations.rule_references: CA_BR080 | CA_BR081 | CA_BR082 | CA_BR083 | CA_BR084 | CA_BR085
validations.conditions: epilepsy != null && epilepsy.PossibleRecording?.PossibleRecordingId != null && epilepsy.PossibleRecording?.PossibleRecordingId == ObservationConstants.Boolean.TRUE | (epilepsy != null && epilepsy.PossibleRecording?.PossibleRecordingId == null | epilepsyFamilyHistory != null && epilepsyFamilyHistory.PossibleRecording?.PossibleRecordingId != null && epilepsyFamilyHistory.PossibleRecording?.PossibleRecordingId == ObservationConstants.Boolean.TRUE

validations.summary: /// Processes the illness and treatment genetic validation. ///
validations.rule_references: CA_BR074 | CA_BR075 | CA_BR076 | CA_BR077 | CA_BR078 | CA_BR079
validations.conditions: genetic != null && genetic.PossibleRecording?.PossibleRecordingId != null && genetic.PossibleRecording?.PossibleRecordingId == ObservationConstants.Boolean.TRUE | (genetic != null && genetic.PossibleRecording?.PossibleRecordingId == null | geneticFamilyHistory != null && geneticFamilyHistory.PossibleRecording?.PossibleRecordingId != null && geneticFamilyHistory.PossibleRecording?.PossibleRecordingId == ObservationConstants.Boolean.TRUE

validations.summary: /// Processes the illness and treatment porphyria validation. ///
validations.rule_references: CA_BR068 | CA_BR069 | CA_BR070 | CA_BR071 | CA_BR072 | CA_BR073
validations.conditions: porphyria != null && porphyria.PossibleRecording?.PossibleRecordingId != null && porphyria.PossibleRecording?.PossibleRecordingId == ObservationConstants.Boolean.TRUE | (porphyria != null && porphyria.PossibleRecording?.PossibleRecordingId == null | porphyriaFamilyHistory != null && porphyriaFamilyHistory.PossibleRecording?.PossibleRecordingId != null && porphyriaFamilyHistory.PossibleRecording?.PossibleRecordingId == ObservationConstants.Boolean.TRUE

validations.summary: /// Processes the illness and treatment kidney validation. ///
validations.rule_references: CA_BR062 | CA_BR063 | CA_BR064 | CA_BR065 | CA_BR066 | CA_BR067
validations.conditions: kidney != null && kidney.PossibleRecording?.PossibleRecordingId != null && kidney.PossibleRecording?.PossibleRecordingId == ObservationConstants.Boolean.TRUE | (kidney != null && kidney.PossibleRecording?.PossibleRecordingId == null | kidneyFamilyHistory != null && kidneyFamilyHistory.PossibleRecording?.PossibleRecordingId != null && kidneyFamilyHistory.PossibleRecording?.PossibleRecordingId == ObservationConstants.Boolean.TRUE

validations.summary: /// Processes the illness and treatment gastric validation. ///
validations.rule_references: CA_BR056 | CA_BR057 | CA_BR058 | CA_BR059 | CA_BR060 | CA_BR061
validations.conditions: gastric != null && gastric.PossibleRecording?.PossibleRecordingId != null && gastric.PossibleRecording?.PossibleRecordingId == ObservationConstants.Boolean.TRUE | (gastric != null && gastric.PossibleRecording?.PossibleRecordingId == null | gastricFamilyHistory != null && gastricFamilyHistory.PossibleRecording?.PossibleRecordingId != null && gastricFamilyHistory.PossibleRecording?.PossibleRecordingId == ObservationConstants.Boolean.TRUE

validations.summary: /// Processes the illness and treatment thyroid validation. ///
validations.rule_references: CA_BR050 | CA_BR051 | CA_BR052 | CA_BR053 | CA_BR054 | CA_BR055
validations.conditions: thyroid != null && thyroid.PossibleRecording?.PossibleRecordingId != null && thyroid.PossibleRecording?.PossibleRecordingId == ObservationConstants.Boolean.TRUE | (thyroid != null && thyroid.PossibleRecording?.PossibleRecordingId == null | thyroidFamilyHistory != null && thyroidFamilyHistory.PossibleRecording?.PossibleRecordingId != null && thyroidFamilyHistory.PossibleRecording?.PossibleRecordingId == ObservationConstants.Boolean.TRUE

validations.summary: /// Processes the illness and treatment diabetes validation. ///
validations.rule_references: CA_BR044 | CA_BR045 | CA_BR046 | CA_BR047 | CA_BR048 | CA_BR049
validations.conditions: diabetes != null && diabetes.PossibleRecording?.PossibleRecordingId != null && diabetes.PossibleRecording?.PossibleRecordingId == ObservationConstants.Boolean.TRUE | (diabetes != null && diabetes.PossibleRecording?.PossibleRecordingId == null | diabetesFamilyHistory != null && diabetesFamilyHistory.PossibleRecording?.PossibleRecordingId != null && diabetesFamilyHistory.PossibleRecording?.PossibleRecordingId == ObservationConstants.Boolean.TRUE

validations.summary: /// Processes the illness and treatment jaundice validation. ///
validations.rule_references: CA_BR038 | CA_BR039 | CA_BR040 | CA_BR041 | CA_BR042 | CA_BR043
validations.conditions: liverCondition != null && liverCondition.PossibleRecording?.PossibleRecordingId != null && liverCondition.PossibleRecording?.PossibleRecordingId == ObservationConstants.Boolean.TRUE | (liverCondition != null && liverCondition.PossibleRecording?.PossibleRecordingId == null | liverConditionFamilyHistory != null && liverConditionFamilyHistory.PossibleRecording?.PossibleRecordingId != null && liverConditionFamilyHistory.PossibleRecording?.PossibleRecordingId == ObservationConstants.Boolean.TRUE

validations.summary: /// Processes the illness and treatment jaundice validation. ///
validations.rule_references: CA_BR110 | CA_BR111 | CA_BR112 | CA_BR113 | CA_BR114 | CA_BR115
validations.conditions: excessiveSnoringCondition != null && excessiveSnoringCondition.PossibleRecording?.PossibleRecordingId != null && excessiveSnoringCondition.PossibleRecording?.PossibleRecordingId == ObservationConstants.Boolean.TRUE | (excessiveSnoringCondition != null && excessiveSnoringCondition.PossibleRecording?.PossibleRecordingId == null | excessiveSnoringConditionFamilyHistory != null && excessiveSnoringConditionFamilyHistory.PossibleRecording?.PossibleRecordingId != null && excessiveSnoringConditionFamilyHistory.PossibleRecording?.PossibleRecordingId == ObservationConstants.Boolean.TRUE

validations.summary: /// Processes the illness and treatment asthma bronchitis validation. ///
validations.rule_references: CA_BR032 | CA_BR033 | CA_BR034 | CA_BR035 | CA_BR036 | CA_BR037
validations.conditions: asthmaBronchitis != null && asthmaBronchitis.PossibleRecording?.PossibleRecordingId != null && asthmaBronchitis.PossibleRecording?.PossibleRecordingId == ObservationConstants.Boolean.TRUE | (asthmaBronchitis != null && asthmaBronchitis.PossibleRecording?.PossibleRecordingId == null | asthmaBronchitisFamilyHistory != null && asthmaBronchitisFamilyHistory.PossibleRecording?.PossibleRecordingId != null && asthmaBronchitisFamilyHistory.PossibleRecording?.PossibleRecordingId == ObservationConstants.Boolean.TRUE

validations.summary: /// Processes the illness and treatment varicose veins validation. ///
validations.rule_references: CA_BR026 | CA_BR027 | CA_BR028 | CA_BR029 | CA_BR030 | CA_BR031
validations.conditions: varicoseVeins != null && varicoseVeins.PossibleRecording?.PossibleRecordingId != null && varicoseVeins.PossibleRecording?.PossibleRecordingId == ObservationConstants.Boolean.TRUE | (varicoseVeins != null && varicoseVeins.PossibleRecording?.PossibleRecordingId == null | varicoseVeinsFamilyHistory != null && varicoseVeinsFamilyHistory.PossibleRecording?.PossibleRecordingId != null && varicoseVeinsFamilyHistory.PossibleRecording?.PossibleRecordingId == ObservationConstants.Boolean.TRUE

validations.summary: /// Processes the illness and treatment blood pressure validation. ///
validations.rule_references: CA_BR020 | CA_BR021 | CA_BR022 | CA_BR023 | CA_BR024 | CA_BR025
validations.conditions: bloodPressure != null && bloodPressure.PossibleRecording?.PossibleRecordingId != null && bloodPressure.PossibleRecording?.PossibleRecordingId == ObservationConstants.Boolean.TRUE | (bloodPressure != null && bloodPressure.PossibleRecording?.PossibleRecordingId == null | bloodPressureFamilyHistory != null && bloodPressureFamilyHistory.PossibleRecording?.PossibleRecordingId != null && bloodPressureFamilyHistory.PossibleRecording?.PossibleRecordingId == ObservationConstants.Boolean.TRUE

validations.summary: /// Processes the illness and treatment heart disease validation. ///
validations.rule_references: CA_BR014 | CA_BR015 | CA_BR016 | CA_BR017 | CA_BR018 | CA_BR019
validations.conditions: heartDisease != null && heartDisease.PossibleRecording?.PossibleRecordingId != null && heartDisease.PossibleRecording?.PossibleRecordingId == ObservationConstants.Boolean.TRUE | (heartDisease != null && heartDisease.PossibleRecording?.PossibleRecordingId == null | heartDiseaseFamilyHistory != null && heartDiseaseFamilyHistory.PossibleRecording?.PossibleRecordingId != null && heartDiseaseFamilyHistory.PossibleRecording?.PossibleRecordingId == ObservationConstants.Boolean.TRUE

validations.rule_references: RichAssessment_SAIDInvalid
validations.conditions: identifier != null | !ValidateSAID(identifier.IdentifierValue

validations.rule_references: RichAssessment_CharacterRepeatedInPersonName | RichAssessment_CharacterRepeatedInPersonSurname | RichAssessment_PatientHasNoDateOfBirth | RichAssessment_PatientHasNoGenderSelected | RichAssessment_PatientHasNoIdentifierOrUnavailableReason | RichAssessment_PatientHasNoInitials | RichAssessment_PatientHasNoName | RichAssessment_PatientHasNoSurname | RichAssessment_PatientHasNoTitleSelected
validations.conditions: !patient.HasIdentifierOrReason.HasValue | string.IsNullOrEmpty(patient.Surname | string.IsNullOrEmpty(patient.Name | string.IsNullOrEmpty(patient.Initials | !patient.TitleId.HasValue | !patient.GenderTypeId.HasValue | !patient.DateOfBirth.HasValue | CharacterRepeatedFourTimesConsecutively(patient.Name | CharacterRepeatedFourTimesConsecutively(patient.Surname

validations.rule_references: RichAssessment_PatientIsDuplicatePerson
validations.conditions: patient != null && HasMatches(patient | patient.IsNew && patient.HasSufficientIdentity(new[] { IdentifierTypeCodeData.IdNumber } | !patient.IsNew // if an existing 'soft' duplicate (same name, surname, dob | id.IsNewObject

validations.rule_references: RichAssessment_AlertsNotAcknowledged
validations.conditions: creditAlerts != null && creditAlerts.Alerts != null && creditAlerts.Alerts.Count > 0 && !creditAlerts.IsAcknowledged

validations.summary: /// Validates the NumeralRecording for a value captured. ///
validations.conditions: observation != null | observation.NumericalRecording == null

validations.summary: /// Checks the mandatory fields of the vital signs process. ///
validations.rule_references: CA_UrinalysisMissingBillirubinScore | CA_UrinalysisMissingBloodAbnormalityScore | CA_UrinalysisMissingGlucoseScore | CA_UrinalysisMissingHaemoglobinScore | CA_UrinalysisMissingKetonesScore | CA_UrinalysisMissingLeucocyteScore | CA_UrinalysisMissingNitritesScore | CA_UrinalysisMissingProteinScore | CA_UrinalysisMissingUrobillinogenScore | CA_UrinalysisPH | CA_UrinanlysisSpecificGravity
validations.conditions: Assessment != null | HasUrinalysisAbnormality | AssessmentContext.VitalSignsChartUrinalysis.HasAbnormalBillirubin && !AssessmentContext.VitalSignsChartUrinalysis.HasAbnormalBillirubinScore | AssessmentContext.VitalSignsChartUrinalysis.HasAbnormalBlood && !AssessmentContext.VitalSignsChartUrinalysis.HasAbnormalBloodScore | AssessmentContext.VitalSignsChartUrinalysis.HasAbnormalGlucose && !AssessmentContext.VitalSignsChartUrinalysis.HasAbnormalGlucoseScore | AssessmentContext.VitalSignsChartUrinalysis.HasAbnormalHaemoglobin && !AssessmentContext.VitalSignsChartUrinalysis.HasAbnormalHaemoglobinScore | AssessmentContext.VitalSignsChartUrinalysis.HasAbnormalKetones && !AssessmentContext.VitalSignsChartUrinalysis.HasAbnormalKetonesScore | AssessmentContext.VitalSignsChartUrinalysis.HasAbnormalLeucocytes && !AssessmentContext.VitalSignsChartUrinalysis.HasAbnormalLeucocytesScore | AssessmentContext.VitalSignsChartUrinalysis.HasAbnormalNitrites && !AssessmentContext.VitalSignsChartUrinalysis.HasAbnormalNitritesScore | AssessmentContext.VitalSignsChartUrinalysis.HasAbnormalProtein && !AssessmentContext.VitalSignsChartUrinalysis.HasAbnormalProteinScore | AssessmentContext.VitalSignsChartUrinalysis.HasAbnormalUrobillinogen && !AssessmentContext.VitalSignsChartUrinalysis.HasAbnormalUrobillinogenScore

validations.summary: /// Validates the NumeralRecording for a value captured. ///
validations.conditions: observation != null | observation.NumericalRecording == null
